summary: Cathy O'Neil announces an upcoming panel discussion at the New America Foundation about her book 'Weapons of Math Destruction.' The event will feature experts from various fields including criminal justice technology, surveillance and civil rights, data innovation policy, and democratic governance. She also mentions a companion essay she wrote for New America called 'Alien Algorithms.' The post serves primarily as an event announcement rather than substantive analysis.
key_points: Panel brings together diverse perspectives on algorithmic accountability from criminal justice, civil liberties, tech policy, and legal academia
Event will be livestreamed for those outside D.C.
O'Neil wrote a companion essay 'Alien Algorithms' for the occasion
money_quotes: a team of technologists working to give people a meaningful voice in how technology shapes their lives
key_insight: Building public discourse around algorithmic accountability requires bringing together technologists, legal experts, civil liberties advocates, and policy scholars.
